title: I18n architecture and locale settings contract
summary: Define locale ownership, browser/system detection, manual override, persistence and missing-key behavior before localization implementation.
acceptance: Defines the i18n architecture for zh-CN and en without making UI authoritative
Defines browser/system language detection where Chinese defaults to zh-CN and non-Chinese defaults to en
Defines manual language override and persistence scope for Web and Windows without broad Electron APIs
Defines missing-key, fallback, pseudo-localization or completeness checks
Does not implement runtime code, save schema, telemetry, accounts or final public claims

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until WM-0111 is done.
